description_long: This object is a stylized deer sculpture with a striking plaid pattern in shades of red, black, and white covering its entire body. The deer stands upright on all four slender legs, with a slightly arched back and a short, pointed tail. Its head is adorned with a prominent set of branched antlers, and the ears are pointed and upright, giving it an alert appearance. The surface appears glossy and hard, suggesting a painted or lacquered finish over a solid material, likely metal or resin. The overall form is anatomically accurate, with well-defined musculature and proportions typical of a deer. The vivid coloration and reflective surface make it visually distinct and eye-catching, suitable for urban decorative use.
description: A glossy, plaid-patterned deer sculpture with prominent antlers and a vivid red, black, and white color scheme. The form is realistic and visually striking, with a hard, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the deer's short, pointed tail, slender legs, and the back of its antlers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the plaid pattern, and the profile of the antlers and head.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical antlers, pointed ears, and the deer's alert facial expression.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body contour, antlers, and the short tail.
